senses.meaningEN: able to be obtained or used

d01-available.usageNote: 指人或物可被取得、使用或联系；describes something obtainable or someone free.
d01-available.speechText: Available. The report is available online.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Reliable health information is now available through many university websites.
examples.translationCN: 如今，许多大学网站都提供可靠的健康信息。
examples.speakText: Reliable health information is now available through many university websites.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 小妇人
examples.text: In the March household, every available hand joined the work before the guests arrived.
examples.translationCN: 在马奇家，每个能帮忙的人都在客人到来前参与了准备。
examples.speakText: In the March household, every available hand joined the work before the guests arrived.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 开放数据
examples.text: Many cities make transport data available so developers can improve journey-planning tools.
examples.translationCN: 许多城市公开交通数据，以便开发者改进行程规划工具。
examples.speakText: Many cities make transport data available so developers can improve journey-planning tools.

senses.meaningEN: relating to one person; a single person

d01-individual.usageNote: 作形容词强调单独个体，作名词指个人；adjective or countable noun.
d01-individual.speechText: Individual. Each individual has a different goal.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The tutor adjusted each assignment to the individual needs of the students.
examples.translationCN: 导师根据学生各自的需要调整了每项作业。
examples.speakText: The tutor adjusted each assignment to the individual needs of the students.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 简爱
examples.text: Jane protects her individual judgment even when authority presses her to surrender it.
examples.translationCN: 即使权威迫使简放弃判断，她仍坚持个人判断。
examples.speakText: Jane protects her individual judgment even when authority presses her to surrender it.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 个性化学习
examples.text: Adaptive learning platforms can offer individual practice paths while teachers monitor the whole class.
examples.translationCN: 自适应学习平台可以提供个性化练习路径，同时教师关注全班情况。
examples.speakText: Adaptive learning platforms can offer individual practice paths while teachers monitor the whole class.

d01-particular.usageNote: 限定某一个或表示格外；use in particular to highlight one item.
d01-particular.speechText: Particular. She showed particular interest in history.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The survey asks whether any particular campus service needs improvement.
examples.translationCN: 调查询问是否有某项特定的校园服务需要改进。
examples.speakText: The survey asks whether any particular campus service needs improvement.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 傲慢与偏见
examples.text: Elizabeth feels no particular wish to please Darcy at their first meetings.
examples.translationCN: 在最初几次见面时，伊丽莎白并不特别想讨好达西。
examples.speakText: Elizabeth feels no particular wish to please Darcy at their first meetings.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 极端天气
examples.text: Heat alerts increasingly target particular neighborhoods where shade and cooling are scarce.
examples.translationCN: 高温预警越来越多地针对缺少树荫和降温设施的特定社区。
examples.speakText: Heat alerts increasingly target particular neighborhoods where shade and cooling are scarce.

senses.meaningEN: important or large enough to be noticed

d01-significant.usageNote: 既可表重要，也可表数量大到值得注意；means important or noticeable in size.
d01-significant.speechText: Significant. The policy caused a significant change.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Regular feedback produced a significant improvement in the students' writing.
examples.translationCN: 定期反馈使学生的写作有了显著提高。
examples.speakText: Regular feedback produced a significant improvement in the students' writing.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 双城记
examples.text: A significant silence falls over the courtroom as the witness changes his account.
examples.translationCN: 当证人改变说法时，法庭陷入意味深长的沉默。
examples.speakText: A significant silence falls over the courtroom as the witness changes his account.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 清洁能源
examples.text: Solar and wind power now make a significant contribution to electricity generation in many countries.
examples.translationCN: 太阳能和风能如今在许多国家的发电结构中占有重要份额。
examples.speakText: Solar and wind power now make a significant contribution to electricity generation in many countries.

d01-essential.usageNote: 强调不可缺少或最根本；stronger than useful or important.
d01-essential.speechText: Essential. Water is essential for life.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Clear communication is essential for successful teamwork.
examples.translationCN: 清晰的沟通对于成功的团队合作必不可少。
examples.speakText: Clear communication is essential for successful teamwork.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 鲁滨逊漂流记
examples.text: On the island, Crusoe learns that patience is as essential as food and shelter.
examples.translationCN: 在岛上，克鲁索明白耐心和食物、住所同样不可或缺。
examples.speakText: On the island, Crusoe learns that patience is as essential as food and shelter.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 公共卫生
examples.text: Accurate local data remain essential when health agencies plan vaccination campaigns.
examples.translationCN: 卫生机构规划疫苗接种行动时，准确的本地数据仍然至关重要。
examples.speakText: Accurate local data remain essential when health agencies plan vaccination campaigns.

d01-relevant.usageNote: 固定搭配 relevant to，不用 relevant with；closely connected to the matter.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Applicants should include only experience relevant to the position.
examples.translationCN: 申请者只应列出与该职位相关的经历。
examples.speakText: Applicants should include only experience relevant to the position.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 福尔摩斯探案
examples.text: Holmes separates the relevant footprint from a confusion of marks on the ground.
examples.translationCN: 福尔摩斯从地面杂乱的痕迹中辨出相关的脚印。
examples.speakText: Holmes separates the relevant footprint from a confusion of marks on the ground.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 人工智能治理
examples.text: Regulators seek relevant evidence about how automated systems affect different communities.
examples.translationCN: 监管机构寻找有关自动化系统如何影响不同群体的相关证据。
examples.speakText: Regulators seek relevant evidence about how automated systems affect different communities.

senses.meaningEN: enough or satisfactory for a purpose

d01-adequate.usageNote: 表示达到最低需要，未必很好；enough for a purpose, not necessarily excellent.
d01-adequate.speechText: Adequate. The room provides adequate space.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Students need adequate time to check their sources before submitting an essay.
examples.translationCN: 学生在提交论文前需要有足够时间核查资料来源。
examples.speakText: Students need adequate time to check their sources before submitting an essay.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 秘密花园
examples.text: Mary finds the plain room adequate once fresh air and friendship brighten her days.
examples.translationCN: 当新鲜空气和友谊照亮生活后，玛丽觉得那间朴素的房间已经够用了。
examples.speakText: Mary finds the plain room adequate once fresh air and friendship brighten her days.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 城市降温
examples.text: Cities are testing whether tree cover provides adequate protection during longer heat waves.
examples.translationCN: 各城市正在检验树木覆盖能否在持续更久的热浪中提供充分保护。
examples.speakText: Cities are testing whether tree cover provides adequate protection during longer heat waves.

d01-previous.usageNote: 只作定语时常指紧接之前；previously 是副词“先前”。
d01-previous.speechText: Previous. Previous studies reached similar results.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Unlike the previous experiment, this trial included a larger sample.
examples.translationCN: 与先前的实验不同，这次试验纳入了更大的样本。
examples.speakText: Unlike the previous experiment, this trial included a larger sample.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 远大前程
examples.text: Pip measures his new ambitions against the simpler hopes of his previous life.
examples.translationCN: 皮普把新的抱负同自己从前生活中更朴素的愿望相比较。
examples.speakText: Pip measures his new ambitions against the simpler hopes of his previous life.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 气候记录
examples.text: Recent temperature records have exceeded many previous national highs.
examples.translationCN: 近年的气温纪录已超过许多国家此前的最高值。
examples.speakText: Recent temperature records have exceeded many previous national highs.

senses.meaningEN: happening now; a flow of water or air

d01-current.usageNote: 形容词表当前，名词表水流、电流等；currently means at present.
d01-current.speechText: Current. The current situation remains uncertain.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The library revised its opening hours to match current student demand.
examples.translationCN: 图书馆调整了开放时间，以适应当前学生的需求。
examples.speakText: The library revised its opening hours to match current student demand.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 白鲸
examples.text: A powerful current carries the Pequod toward waters that unsettle the crew.
examples.translationCN: 一股强劲洋流把裴廓德号带向令船员不安的海域。
examples.speakText: A powerful current carries the Pequod toward waters that unsettle the crew.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 电池技术
examples.text: Current battery research focuses on cost, safety, charging speed, and material supply.
examples.translationCN: 当前的电池研究关注成本、安全、充电速度和材料供应。
examples.speakText: Current battery research focuses on cost, safety, charging speed, and material supply.

senses.meaningEN: typical or calculated as a mean

d01-average.usageNote: average 可指算术平均，也可指普通水平；on average 作状语。
d01-average.speechText: Average. The average score rose this year.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: On average, commuters saved twelve minutes by taking the new route.
examples.translationCN: 平均而言，通勤者走新路线节省了十二分钟。
examples.speakText: On average, commuters saved twelve minutes by taking the new route.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 爱丽丝梦游仙境
examples.text: Nothing about Alice's afternoon remains average after the White Rabbit passes by.
examples.translationCN: 白兔经过后，爱丽丝的下午再也没有任何普通之处。
examples.speakText: Nothing about Alice's afternoon remains average after the White Rabbit passes by.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 海平面
examples.text: Global average sea level continues to rise as oceans warm and land ice melts.
examples.translationCN: 随着海洋变暖和陆地冰融化，全球平均海平面持续上升。
examples.speakText: Global average sea level continues to rise as oceans warm and land ice melts.

d01-specific.usageNote: 强调清楚精确；specific to 还可表示某物独有。
d01-specific.speechText: Specific. Give a specific reason for your choice.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The professor asked for a specific example rather than a broad claim.
examples.translationCN: 教授要求给出一个具体例子，而不是笼统的说法。
examples.speakText: The professor asked for a specific example rather than a broad claim.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 格列佛游记
examples.text: Gulliver records the specific customs of each strange society he visits.
examples.translationCN: 格列佛记录了他所到访的每个奇异社会的具体习俗。
examples.speakText: Gulliver records the specific customs of each strange society he visits.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 疾病监测
examples.text: Wastewater monitoring can reveal specific disease trends without identifying individual residents.
examples.translationCN: 污水监测可以揭示特定疾病趋势，而不会识别居民个人。
examples.speakText: Wastewater monitoring can reveal specific disease trends without identifying individual residents.

senses.meaningEN: fairly large in amount or degree

d01-considerable.usageNote: 修饰数量、程度，语气比 large 更正式；considerably 是副词。
d01-considerable.speechText: Considerable. The project required considerable effort.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Learning to evaluate online sources requires considerable patience and practice.
examples.translationCN: 学会评估网络资料需要相当多的耐心和练习。
examples.speakText: Learning to evaluate online sources requires considerable patience and practice.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 金银岛
examples.text: Jim shows considerable courage when he slips away from the pirates.
examples.translationCN: 吉姆从海盗身边溜走时表现出非凡的勇气。
examples.speakText: Jim shows considerable courage when he slips away from the pirates.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 芯片制造
examples.text: Building advanced semiconductor facilities demands considerable capital, energy, water, and expertise.
examples.translationCN: 建设先进半导体工厂需要大量资金、能源、水和专业知识。
examples.speakText: Building advanced semiconductor facilities demands considerable capital, energy, water, and expertise.

d01-likely.usageNote: 作形容词时常用 be likely to do；作副词时可说 will likely do，表示“很可能会……”。
d01-likely.speechText: Likely. Prices are likely to rise.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Students are more likely to remember ideas they connect with examples.
examples.translationCN: 学生更有可能记住那些与实例联系起来的观点。
examples.speakText: Students are more likely to remember ideas they connect with examples.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 黑骏马
examples.text: A gentle driver is likely to earn Black Beauty's trust more quickly than a harsh one.
examples.translationCN: 温和的车夫比粗暴的车夫更可能迅速赢得黑骏马的信任。
examples.speakText: A gentle driver is likely to earn Black Beauty's trust more quickly than a harsh one.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 高温风险
examples.text: Densely built neighborhoods with little shade are likely to experience greater heat stress.
examples.translationCN: 建筑密集且缺少树荫的社区更可能承受较严重的热应激。
examples.speakText: Densely built neighborhoods with little shade are likely to experience greater heat stress.

d01-negative.usageNote: 可表不利、否定或负数；语境决定含义。
d01-negative.speechText: Negative. Negative comments reduced her confidence.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Too little sleep can have a negative effect on concentration.
examples.translationCN: 睡眠太少会对注意力产生负面影响。
examples.speakText: Too little sleep can have a negative effect on concentration.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 圣诞颂歌
examples.text: Scrooge's negative view of generosity begins to change during the night's visits.
examples.translationCN: 在夜间的几次造访中，斯克鲁奇对慷慨的消极看法开始改变。
examples.speakText: Scrooge's negative view of generosity begins to change during the night's visits.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 社交媒体
examples.text: Researchers continue to study both positive and negative effects of social media on adolescents.
examples.translationCN: 研究人员继续研究社交媒体对青少年的正面和负面影响。
examples.speakText: Researchers continue to study both positive and negative effects of social media on adolescents.

d01-positive.usageNote: 可表积极、有利、肯定或正数；avoid confusing with merely certain.
d01-positive.speechText: Positive. The change had a positive effect.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Peer support created a positive atmosphere in the study group.
examples.translationCN: 同伴支持在学习小组中营造了积极氛围。
examples.speakText: Peer support created a positive atmosphere in the study group.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 波莉安娜
examples.text: Pollyanna searches for one positive thought even when disappointment fills the room.
examples.translationCN: 即使房间里充满失望，波莉安娜仍寻找一个积极的念头。
examples.speakText: Pollyanna searches for one positive thought even when disappointment fills the room.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 生态修复
examples.text: Wetland restoration can produce positive results for flood control, wildlife, and water quality.
examples.translationCN: 湿地修复可为防洪、野生动物和水质带来积极成效。
examples.speakText: Wetland restoration can produce positive results for flood control, wildlife, and water quality.

d01-proper.usageNote: 强调符合规则、目的或礼仪；properly 为副词。
d01-proper.speechText: Proper. Proper planning can save time.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Laboratory equipment must be stored in the proper place after use.
examples.translationCN: 实验室设备使用后必须存放在正确的位置。
examples.speakText: Laboratory equipment must be stored in the proper place after use.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 绿山墙的安妮
examples.text: Marilla teaches Anne the proper way to greet a guest, though imagination soon interrupts.
examples.translationCN: 玛丽拉教安妮用合宜的方式问候客人，尽管想象力很快打了岔。
examples.speakText: Marilla teaches Anne the proper way to greet a guest, though imagination soon interrupts.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 电子废弃物
examples.text: Proper recycling keeps valuable metals in use and hazardous materials out of soil.
examples.translationCN: 妥善回收可让有价值的金属继续利用，并防止有害物质进入土壤。
examples.speakText: Proper recycling keeps valuable metals in use and hazardous materials out of soil.

senses.meaningEN: having the usual features of a type

d01-typical.usageNote: typical of 表示具有某类常见特征；不等于 average in every case.
d01-typical.speechText: Typical. This is a typical urban problem.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The chart shows a typical pattern of energy use across the day.
examples.translationCN: 图表显示了一天中能源使用的典型模式。
examples.speakText: The chart shows a typical pattern of energy use across the day.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 柳林风声
examples.text: Rat's welcome is typical of the warm riverbank friendship Mole comes to treasure.
examples.translationCN: 河鼠的欢迎体现了典型的河岸温情，鼹鼠后来对此十分珍惜。
examples.speakText: Rat's welcome is typical of the warm riverbank friendship Mole comes to treasure.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 混合办公
examples.text: A typical hybrid schedule combines remote work with several shared office days.
examples.translationCN: 典型的混合办公安排把远程工作与每周若干共同到岗日结合起来。
examples.speakText: A typical hybrid schedule combines remote work with several shared office days.

senses.meaningEN: almost the same but not exactly

d01-similar.usageNote: 固定搭配 similar to，不用 similar with；means alike but not identical.
d01-similar.speechText: Similar. The two methods produce similar results.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The two courses cover similar topics but use different teaching methods.
examples.translationCN: 这两门课程涉及相似主题，但采用不同教学方法。
examples.speakText: The two courses cover similar topics but use different teaching methods.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 王子与贫儿
examples.text: Edward and Tom look similar enough for exchanged clothes to confuse everyone.
examples.translationCN: 爱德华和汤姆长得十分相似，互换衣服后所有人都认错了。
examples.speakText: Edward and Tom look similar enough for exchanged clothes to confuse everyone.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 传染病预警
examples.text: Countries are building similar early-warning systems that combine laboratory and wastewater data.
examples.translationCN: 各国正在建立类似的预警系统，结合实验室和污水数据。
examples.speakText: Countries are building similar early-warning systems that combine laboratory and wastewater data.

d01-various.usageNote: 强调若干不同种类，后接复数名词；varied 强调多样性。

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Volunteers used various methods to encourage residents to save water.
examples.translationCN: 志愿者采用多种方法鼓励居民节约用水。
examples.speakText: Volunteers used various methods to encourage residents to save water.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 八十天环游地球
examples.text: Fogg crosses various landscapes without allowing delay to disturb his calm.
examples.translationCN: 福格穿越各种地貌，却不让延误扰乱自己的镇定。
examples.sourceTitle: Around the World in Eighty Days
examples.speakText: Fogg crosses various landscapes without allowing delay to disturb his calm.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 可再生能源
examples.text: Various storage technologies are being tested to balance electricity from wind and solar power.
examples.translationCN: 人们正在测试多种储能技术，以平衡风能和太阳能发电。
examples.speakText: Various storage technologies are being tested to balance electricity from wind and solar power.

d01-frequent.usageNote: 表示发生次数多；frequently 修饰动词，frequency 是频率。

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Frequent short reviews are often more effective than one long study session.
examples.translationCN: 频繁的短时复习往往比一次长时间学习更有效。
examples.speakText: Frequent short reviews are often more effective than one long study session.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 小公主
examples.text: Sara's frequent stories turn a cold attic into a place of imagined wonder.
examples.translationCN: 萨拉经常讲故事，把冰冷的阁楼变成充满想象奇景的地方。
examples.speakText: Sara's frequent stories turn a cold attic into a place of imagined wonder.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 洪水适应
examples.text: More frequent urban flooding is prompting investment in drainage, wetlands, and warning systems.
examples.translationCN: 更频繁的城市洪涝正推动排水、湿地和预警系统方面的投资。
examples.speakText: More frequent urban flooding is prompting investment in drainage, wetlands, and warning systems.

senses.meaningEN: to show that something is true

d02-indicate.usageNote: 可接名词或 that 从句，表示证据所显示；not normally followed by to do.
d02-indicate.speechText: Indicate. The data indicate a clear trend.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The results indicate that short breaks can improve attention.
examples.translationCN: 结果表明，短暂休息可以提高注意力。
examples.speakText: The results indicate that short breaks can improve attention.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 德古拉
examples.text: Small marks on the window indicate that someone has entered Lucy's room.
examples.translationCN: 窗户上的细小痕迹表明有人进入过露西的房间。
examples.speakText: Small marks on the window indicate that someone has entered Lucy's room.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 全球变暖
examples.text: Long-term observations indicate that oceans are absorbing most of the excess heat from global warming.
examples.translationCN: 长期观测表明，海洋正在吸收全球变暖产生的大部分额外热量。
examples.speakText: Long-term observations indicate that oceans are absorbing most of the excess heat from global warming.

senses.meaningEN: to include or require as a part

d02-involve.usageNote: 后接动名词，不接 to do；involve someone in something.
d02-involve.speechText: Involve. The job involves working with children.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The research project will involve interviewing local business owners.
examples.translationCN: 该研究项目将包括采访当地企业主。
examples.speakText: The research project will involve interviewing local business owners.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 雾都孤儿
examples.text: Oliver's search for safety begins to involve people from every level of London society.
examples.translationCN: 奥利弗对安全的寻求开始牵涉伦敦社会各阶层的人。
examples.speakText: Oliver's search for safety begins to involve people from every level of London society.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 能源转型
examples.text: Modernizing power grids will involve new transmission lines, storage, and flexible demand.
examples.translationCN: 电网现代化将涉及新输电线路、储能和灵活用电需求。
examples.speakText: Modernizing power grids will involve new transmission lines, storage, and flexible demand.

d02-require.usageNote: 物作主语常表客观需要；require doing 可表需要被做。
d02-require.speechText: Require. The task requires careful planning.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Successful group work requires members to share information openly.
examples.translationCN: 成功的小组合作要求成员公开分享信息。
examples.speakText: Successful group work requires members to share information openly.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 汤姆·索亚历险记
examples.text: Tom decides that painting the fence requires rare skill, and the other boys believe him.
examples.translationCN: 汤姆断言刷篱笆需要罕见的技巧，其他男孩信了他。
examples.speakText: Tom decides that painting the fence requires rare skill, and the other boys believe him.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 网络安全
examples.text: Protecting public infrastructure requires regular updates, trained staff, and tested recovery plans.
examples.translationCN: 保护公共基础设施需要定期更新、训练有素的人员和经过检验的恢复方案。
examples.speakText: Protecting public infrastructure requires regular updates, trained staff, and tested recovery plans.

d02-obtain.usageNote: 正式用词，强调通过努力或程序取得；more formal than get.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Participants must obtain permission before recording the interview.
examples.translationCN: 参与者在录制采访前必须获得许可。
examples.speakText: Participants must obtain permission before recording the interview.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 基督山伯爵
examples.text: Dantès studies patiently to obtain the knowledge he was once denied.
examples.translationCN: 唐泰斯耐心学习，以获得曾经无缘接触的知识。
examples.speakText: Dantès studies patiently to obtain the knowledge he was once denied.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 卫星数据
examples.text: Farmers can obtain near-real-time satellite information about soil moisture and crop stress.
examples.translationCN: 农民可以获得有关土壤湿度和作物胁迫的近实时卫星信息。
examples.speakText: Farmers can obtain near-real-time satellite information about soil moisture and crop stress.

senses.meaningEN: to keep in a good or unchanged state

d02-maintain.usageNote: 可指保持状态、保养设备或坚持观点；maintain that introduces a claim.
d02-maintain.speechText: Maintain. Exercise helps maintain good health.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: A balanced routine helps students maintain their energy during exams.
examples.translationCN: 均衡的作息有助于学生在考试期间保持精力。
examples.speakText: A balanced routine helps students maintain their energy during exams.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 理智与情感
examples.text: Elinor struggles to maintain composure while protecting her family's feelings.
examples.translationCN: 埃莉诺努力保持镇定，同时照顾家人的感受。
examples.speakText: Elinor struggles to maintain composure while protecting her family's feelings.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 基础设施
examples.text: Transport agencies use sensors to maintain bridges before small defects become dangerous.
examples.translationCN: 交通机构利用传感器维护桥梁，避免小缺陷变得危险。
examples.speakText: Transport agencies use sensors to maintain bridges before small defects become dangerous.

d02-establish.usageNote: 可指建立组织或用证据确定事实；context distinguishes create from prove.
d02-establish.speechText: Establish. The company established a new standard.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The committee hopes to establish clear rules for sharing research data.
examples.translationCN: 委员会希望确立共享研究数据的明确规则。
examples.speakText: The committee hopes to establish clear rules for sharing research data.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 弗兰肯斯坦
examples.text: Victor tries to establish the boundary between scientific ambition and moral duty.
examples.translationCN: 维克多试图确定科学雄心与道德责任之间的界限。
examples.speakText: Victor tries to establish the boundary between scientific ambition and moral duty.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 月球探索
examples.text: Several space programs plan to establish sustained scientific operations around the Moon.
examples.translationCN: 多个航天计划准备在月球周边建立持续的科学活动。
examples.speakText: Several space programs plan to establish sustained scientific operations around the Moon.

d02-identify.usageNote: 强调辨认身份或找出具体对象；identify with 表示认同。
d02-identify.speechText: Identify. The study identifies three main causes.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Readers should identify the author's main claim before judging the evidence.
examples.translationCN: 读者在判断证据前应先确定作者的主要论点。
examples.speakText: Readers should identify the author's main claim before judging the evidence.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 月亮宝石
examples.text: The investigators struggle to identify who moved the jewel during the night.
examples.translationCN: 调查者努力确认是谁在夜间移动了宝石。
examples.speakText: The investigators struggle to identify who moved the jewel during the night.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 生物多样性
examples.text: Environmental DNA helps scientists identify species from traces left in water or soil.
examples.translationCN: 环境 DNA 帮助科学家通过水或土壤中的痕迹识别物种。
examples.speakText: Environmental DNA helps scientists identify species from traces left in water or soil.

senses.meaningEN: to show, send back light, or think deeply

d02-reflect.usageNote: reflect something 表反映；reflect on 表认真思考。
d02-reflect.speechText: Reflect. The results reflect changing attitudes.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The final report should reflect both the successes and limits of the project.
examples.translationCN: 最终报告应同时反映项目的成果与局限。
examples.speakText: The final report should reflect both the successes and limits of the project.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 沃尔登
examples.text: Beside the pond, Thoreau finds time to reflect on simplicity and independence.
examples.translationCN: 在湖畔，梭罗有时间思考简朴与独立。
examples.speakText: Beside the pond, Thoreau finds time to reflect on simplicity and independence.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 城市设计
examples.text: New street designs reflect growing demand for safer walking and cycling.
examples.translationCN: 新的街道设计反映了人们对更安全步行和骑行日益增长的需求。
examples.speakText: New street designs reflect growing demand for safer walking and cycling.

d02-determine.usageNote: 可表示决定结果或查明事实；determined 作形容词表坚定。
d02-determine.speechText: Determine. Income may determine spending choices.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Further testing is needed to determine whether the material is safe.
examples.translationCN: 需要进一步测试来确定这种材料是否安全。
examples.speakText: Further testing is needed to determine whether the material is safe.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 绿野仙踪
examples.text: Dorothy cannot determine which road will lead her safely toward the Emerald City.
examples.translationCN: 多萝西无法确定哪条路能让她安全到达翡翠城。
examples.speakText: Dorothy cannot determine which road will lead her safely toward the Emerald City.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 极端天气归因
examples.text: Climate attribution studies help determine how warming changes the likelihood of extreme events.
examples.translationCN: 气候归因研究有助于确定变暖如何改变极端事件发生的可能性。
examples.speakText: Climate attribution studies help determine how warming changes the likelihood of extreme events.

d02-represent.usageNote: 可指代表群体、象征意义或描绘事物；stress is on the final syllable.
d02-represent.speechText: Represent. These figures represent national averages.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The colored lines represent changes in demand across four seasons.
examples.translationCN: 这些彩色线条表示四季需求的变化。
examples.speakText: The colored lines represent changes in demand across four seasons.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 红字
examples.text: The embroidered letter comes to represent more than the punishment intended for Hester.
examples.translationCN: 那枚绣字后来所代表的含义超出了原本对海丝特的惩罚。
examples.speakText: The embroidered letter comes to represent more than the punishment intended for Hester.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 气候谈判
examples.text: Youth observers increasingly seek opportunities to represent future generations in climate discussions.
examples.translationCN: 青年观察员越来越多地寻求在气候讨论中代表未来世代的机会。
examples.speakText: Youth observers increasingly seek opportunities to represent future generations in climate discussions.

senses.meaningEN: to give or help cause something

d02-contribute.usageNote: contribute to 中 to 是介词，后接名词或动名词；可表积极或消极促成。
d02-contribute.speechText: Contribute. Many factors contribute to success.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Every team member was invited to contribute ideas at the meeting.
examples.translationCN: 每位团队成员都受邀在会上贡献想法。
examples.speakText: Every team member was invited to contribute ideas at the meeting.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 小妇人
examples.text: Beth contributes quiet kindness to the busy life of the March family.
examples.translationCN: 贝丝以安静的善意为马奇一家忙碌的生活作出贡献。
examples.speakText: Beth contributes quiet kindness to the busy life of the March family.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 公民科学
examples.text: Volunteers contribute millions of wildlife observations to global biodiversity databases.
examples.translationCN: 志愿者为全球生物多样性数据库贡献了数百万条野生动物观察记录。
examples.speakText: Volunteers contribute millions of wildlife observations to global biodiversity databases.

senses.meaningEN: to accept as true without proof; take on

d02-assume.usageNote: 既可指未经证实地假定，也可指承担职责；do not confuse assumption with evidence.
d02-assume.speechText: Assume. We should not assume that costs are low.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: We should not assume that every student has reliable internet access.
examples.translationCN: 我们不应假定每个学生都有稳定的互联网接入。
examples.speakText: We should not assume that every student has reliable internet access.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 傲慢与偏见
examples.text: Darcy learns that he cannot assume his intentions are understood without explanation.
examples.translationCN: 达西明白，他不能想当然地认为自己的意图无需解释就会被理解。
examples.speakText: Darcy learns that he cannot assume his intentions are understood without explanation.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 自动化
examples.text: Workforce plans should not assume that automation affects every occupation in the same way.
examples.translationCN: 劳动力规划不应假定自动化对每种职业的影响都相同。
examples.speakText: Workforce plans should not assume that automation affects every occupation in the same way.

d02-reduce.usageNote: reduce by 表减少的幅度，reduce to 表降到的数值。
d02-reduce.speechText: Reduce. Public transport can reduce pollution.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Turning off unused equipment can reduce the laboratory's electricity bill.
examples.translationCN: 关闭不用的设备可以降低实验室的电费。
examples.speakText: Turning off unused equipment can reduce the laboratory's electricity bill.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 悲惨世界
examples.text: The bishop's mercy helps reduce Valjean's bitterness toward the world.
examples.translationCN: 主教的仁慈帮助减轻了冉阿让对世界的怨恨。
examples.speakText: The bishop's mercy helps reduce Valjean's bitterness toward the world.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 甲烷排放
examples.text: Repairing leaks in oil and gas systems can rapidly reduce methane emissions.
examples.translationCN: 修复石油和天然气系统的泄漏可以迅速减少甲烷排放。
examples.speakText: Repairing leaks in oil and gas systems can rapidly reduce methane emissions.

d02-increase.usageNote: 作动词末音节重读；increase by 表增幅，to 表终值。

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Adding clear signs may increase the number of visitors who recycle correctly.
examples.translationCN: 增设清晰标识可能会增加正确分类回收的游客人数。
examples.speakText: Adding clear signs may increase the number of visitors who recycle correctly.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 彼得·潘
examples.text: The children's excitement increases as the lights of Neverland appear.
examples.translationCN: 当梦幻岛的灯光出现时，孩子们越来越兴奋。
examples.speakText: The children's excitement increases as the lights of Neverland appear.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 电动交通
examples.text: Demand for charging infrastructure continues to increase as electric vehicle use expands.
examples.translationCN: 随着电动汽车使用扩大，对充电基础设施的需求持续增长。
examples.speakText: Demand for charging infrastructure continues to increase as electric vehicle use expands.

d02-provide.usageNote: provide someone with something 或 provide something for someone.
d02-provide.speechText: Provide. The course provides practical skills.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The orientation program provides new students with practical campus information.
examples.translationCN: 迎新项目为新生提供实用的校园信息。
examples.speakText: The orientation program provides new students with practical campus information.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 海蒂
examples.text: The mountain air and her grandfather's care provide Heidi with strength and joy.
examples.translationCN: 山间空气和祖父的照料给海蒂带来力量与快乐。
examples.speakText: The mountain air and her grandfather's care provide Heidi with strength and joy.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 地球观测
examples.text: Earth-observation satellites provide rapid maps after floods, fires, and earthquakes.
examples.translationCN: 地球观测卫星在洪水、火灾和地震后提供快速地图。
examples.speakText: Earth-observation satellites provide rapid maps after floods, fires, and earthquakes.

d02-explain.usageNote: 说 explain something to someone，不说 explain someone something.
d02-explain.speechText: Explain. Can you explain the result?

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The diagram helps explain how water moves through the system.
examples.translationCN: 这张图有助于解释水如何在系统中流动。
examples.speakText: The diagram helps explain how water moves through the system.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 时间机器
examples.text: The Time Traveller tries to explain a future that his dinner guests can barely imagine.
examples.translationCN: 时间旅行者试图解释一个晚餐客人几乎无法想象的未来。
examples.speakText: The Time Traveller tries to explain a future that his dinner guests can barely imagine.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 科学传播
examples.text: Researchers use visual models to explain complex climate risks to local decision-makers.
examples.translationCN: 研究人员使用视觉模型向地方决策者解释复杂的气候风险。
examples.speakText: Researchers use visual models to explain complex climate risks to local decision-makers.

d02-suggest.usageNote: 接 doing 或 that 从句，不接 suggest someone to do.
d02-suggest.speechText: Suggest. The findings suggest a new approach.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The counselor suggested joining a study group before the final exam.
examples.translationCN: 辅导员建议在期末考试前加入学习小组。
examples.speakText: The counselor suggested joining a study group before the final exam.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 螺丝在拧紧
examples.text: The governess believes that every shadow may suggest a hidden presence.
examples.translationCN: 女家庭教师认为每一道阴影都可能暗示着隐秘的存在。
examples.speakText: The governess believes that every shadow may suggest a hidden presence.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 四天工作制试验
examples.text: Several workplace trials suggest that shorter weeks can preserve output while improving well-being.
examples.translationCN: 多项职场试验表明，缩短每周工时可能在保持产出的同时改善福祉。
examples.speakText: Several workplace trials suggest that shorter weeks can preserve output while improving well-being.

d02-compare.usageNote: compare with 强调异同；compare to 常强调相似或比喻。
d02-compare.speechText: Compare. Compare the two methods carefully.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The assignment asks students to compare two solutions to the same problem.
examples.translationCN: 这项作业要求学生比较同一问题的两种解决方案。
examples.speakText: The assignment asks students to compare two solutions to the same problem.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 呼啸山庄
examples.text: Nelly compares Catherine's restless passion with Edgar's quiet affection.
examples.translationCN: 内莉把凯瑟琳不安的激情与埃德加平静的爱意相比较。
examples.speakText: Nelly compares Catherine's restless passion with Edgar's quiet affection.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 低碳交通
examples.text: Cities compare electric buses, rail, and cycling networks when planning lower-carbon transport.
examples.translationCN: 城市在规划低碳交通时会比较电动公交、轨道交通和自行车网络。
examples.speakText: Cities compare electric buses, rail, and cycling networks when planning lower-carbon transport.

senses.meaningEN: to know again or accept as true

d02-recognize.usageNote: 可指认出熟悉对象或承认事实、价值；recognize as names a role.
d02-recognize.speechText: Recognize. We recognize the need for change.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: Good readers recognize when an argument lacks supporting evidence.
examples.translationCN: 优秀的读者能意识到一个论点何时缺乏支持证据。
examples.speakText: Good readers recognize when an argument lacks supporting evidence.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 奥德赛
examples.text: After years apart, the old dog is the first to recognize Odysseus.
examples.translationCN: 分别多年后，那条老狗最先认出了奥德修斯。
examples.speakText: After years apart, the old dog is the first to recognize Odysseus.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 原住民知识
examples.text: More conservation programs recognize Indigenous knowledge as valuable evidence for managing ecosystems.
examples.translationCN: 越来越多的保护项目承认原住民知识是管理生态系统的重要依据。
examples.speakText: More conservation programs recognize Indigenous knowledge as valuable evidence for managing ecosystems.

d02-respond.usageNote: 固定搭配 respond to；reply 更偏言语回答，respond 也可指反应。
d02-respond.speechText: Respond. Customers responded well to the change.

examples.label: CET-4 原创例句
examples.text: The university promised to respond to student feedback within two weeks.
examples.translationCN: 学校承诺在两周内回应学生反馈。
examples.speakText: The university promised to respond to student feedback within two weeks.

examples.label: 文学改写 · 简爱
examples.text: Jane responds to injustice with a courage that surprises those around her.
examples.translationCN: 简以勇气回应不公，这令周围的人感到惊讶。
examples.speakText: Jane responds to injustice with a courage that surprises those around her.

examples.label: 当代语境 · 灾害预警
examples.text: Mobile alert systems help communities respond more quickly to wildfires and flash floods.
examples.translationCN: 移动预警系统帮助社区更快应对野火和山洪。
examples.speakText: Mobile alert systems help communities respond more quickly to wildfires and flash floods.
